_source: Generated from PoE2DB tier pages plus official trade2 stat metadata where exact public stat text exists.
_patch_basis: 0.5.4b Hotfix 3; official 0.5.0 Waystone mod removals still apply.
_limitations: PoE2DB exposes hidden reward lines such as more Waystones found in Area that are not exposed as official trade2 stat filters.
The optimizer is a rule-of-thumb planner, not a profit simulator; no live price/listing data is scraped.
Official trade stat IDs are included only for exact public stat-text matches. Missing IDs are left blank instead of guessed.
Build safety is personal: a modifier tagged avoid for conservative play may still be profitable for a build that counters it.
official_patch_guardrails: 0.5.0: Waystones will no longer have the of Nemeses modifier.
0.5.0: Waystones will no longer have the Extra Projectiles modifier, and existing Extra Projectiles Waystones are disabled.

goals.name: Safe Waystone Sustain
goals.notes: For routine mapping, prefer reward density on mods your build barely notices. Skip hard player-penalty rows unless you specifically built around them.

goals.name: Currency / Density Push
goals.notes: Aggressive currency farming can accept more monster danger, but still avoid disabled rows and build-bricking player penalties.

goals.name: Boss / Logbook Support
goals.notes: Pairs with Overseer of Pathways, Expedition of Knowledge, and high-density tablets; keep map deaths low so sustain math actually works.
